violations.text: There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food lettuce and tomatoes with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. See disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quaternary Ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The floor in the service line area is in poor repair, inspector observed missing tile. The wall in the ware washing area is in poor repair, inspector observed hole. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
No person was certified in food safety at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The hand washing sink in the kitchen was lacking signage. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Potatoes were observed held at 56 degrees Fahrenheit in prep area. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC moved to cooler. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Kale salad was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Desserts packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the service line area. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Inspector observed missing outlet cover in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The floor in the kitchen area is in poor repair, observed missing tile with temporary fix. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Prep sink is lacking a partition. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Establishment is lacking air drying racks. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Ambient of Refrigerator #1, #2, #3 and prep unit was between 65 - 75 degrees Farenheit. Cold holding equipment must be turned on prior to reinspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
At the time of inspection, no hot water was available at hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
Observed missing ceiling tiles throughout kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
